Title: DeepSeek-Coder-V2: Breaking the Barrier of Closed-Source Models in Code Intelligence
Dataset: GitHub public repositories created before November 2023
Preprocessing method: filter out files with an average line length exceeding 100 characters or a maximum line length surpassing 1000 characters. Additionally, we remove files with fewer than 25% alphabetic characters. Except for the XSLT programming language, we further filter out files where the string "<?xml version=" appears in the first 100 characters. For HTML files, we consider the ratio of visible text to HTML code. We retain files where the visible text constitutes at least 20% of the code and is no less than 100 characters. For JSON and YAML files... we only keep files that have a character count ranging from 50 to 5000 characters. By applying these filtering rules and near-deduplication, we obtain 821B code

Author: DeepSeek-AI; Zhu, Qihao; Guo, Daya; Shao, Zhihong; Yang, Dejian; Wang, Peiyi; Xu, Runxin; Wu, Y.; Li, Yukun; Gao, Huazuo; Ma, Shirong; Zeng, Wangding; Bi, Xiao; Gu, Zihui; Xu, Hanwei; Dai, Damai; Dong, Kai; Zhang, Liyue; Piao, Yishi; Gou, Zhibin; Xie, Zhenda; Hao, Zhewen; Wang, Bingxuan; Song, Junxiao; Chen, Deli; Xie, Xin; Guan, Kang; You, Yuxiang; Liu, Aixin; Du, Qiushi; Gao, Wenjun; Lu, Xuan; Chen, Qinyu; Wang, Yaohui; Deng, Chengqi; Li, Jiashi; Zhao, Chenggang; Ruan, Chong; Luo, Fuli; Liang, Wenfeng
Title: DeepSeek-Coder-V2: Breaking the Barrier of Closed-Source Models in Code Intelligence
Dataset: Common Crawl (code-related and math-related web texts)
Preprocessing method: select coding forums such as StackOverflow, library sites such as PyTorch documentation, and mathematics website such as StackExchange as our initial seed corpus. Using this seed corpus, we train a fastText model (Joulin et al., 2016) to recall more coding-related and math-related web pages. ... we use the Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenizer from DeepSeek-V2 ... Domains with over 10% of web pages collected are classified as code-related or math-related. We then annotate the URLs ... Uncollected web pages linked to these URLs are added to the seed corpus.

Title: DeepSeek-V3 Technical Report
Preprocessing method: Optimized the corpus by enhancing the ratio of mathematical and programming samples and expanding multilingual coverage. Refined to minimize redundancy while maintaining corpus diversity. Implemented document packing method for data integrity without cross-sample attention masking. Incorporated Prefix-Suffix-Middle (PSM) framework for Fill-in-Middle (FIM) strategy. Randomly split a certain proportion of combined tokens during training to mitigate token boundary bias.

Title: DeepSeek-V3.2: Pushing the Frontier of Open Large Language Models
Preprocessing method: Sample informative long-tail entities across diverse domains from large-scale web corpora. A question-construction agent explores each entity using search tools... multiple answer-generation agents produce diverse candidate responses... a verification agent validates all answers... retaining only samples where the ground-truth is correct and all candidates are verifiably incorrect. Augmented with filtered instances from existing helpful RL datasets.
Preprocessing agent: multi-agent pipeline based on DeepSeek-V3.2 (question-construction agent, answer-generation agents, verification agent)

Title: DeepSeek-V3.2: Pushing the Frontier of Open Large Language Models

Filtered using heuristic rules and LLM-based judgments to ensure high quality... automated environment-setup agent handles package installation, dependency resolution, and test execution... deemed successfully built only when applying the gold patch results in a non-zero count of false-to-positive (F2P) test cases and a zero count of pass-to-fail (P2F) test cases.
Preprocessing agent: automated environment-setup agent powered by DeepSeek-V3.2, heuristic rules, and LLM-based judgments

Author: Martins, Pedro Henrique; Alves, João; Fernandes, Patrick; Guerreiro, Nuno M.; Rei, Ricardo; Farajian, Amin; Klimaszewski, Mateusz; Alves, Duarte M.; Pombal, José; Boizard, Nicolas; Faysse, Manuel; Colombo, Pierre; Yvon, François; Haddow, Barry; Souza, José G. Title: EuroLLM-9B: Technical Report
Preprocessing method: selecting documents with educational scores above 2 according to their model-based classifier. The dataset underwent individual dump deduplication and heuristic filtering. For the 2nd and 3rd training phases, we raise the FineWeb-edu score threshold to 3 for English.

Author: Martins, Pedro Henrique; Alves, João; Fernandes, Patrick; Guerreiro, Nuno M.; Rei, Ricardo; Farajian, Amin; Klimaszewski, Mateusz; Alves, Duarte M.; Pombal, José; Boizard, Nicolas; Faysse, Manuel; Colombo, Pierre; Yvon, François; Haddow, Barry; Souza, José G. C. de; Birch, Alexandra; Martins, André F. T.
Title: EuroLLM-9B: Technical Report
Preprocessing method: pre-deduplicated. We further apply perplexity filtering using KenLM, along with various heuristic filters. Specifically, we remove documents with fewer than 200 characters and any page containing the phrase "lorem ipsum," the word "javascript," or curly brackets. Additionally, we exclude paragraphs where the fraction of uppercase letters exceeds 40%, the symbol-to-word ratio is greater than 0.1, or the ratio of words without alphabetic letters exceeds 0.2

Author: Martins, Pedro Henrique; Alves, João; Fernandes, Patrick; Guerreiro, Nuno M.; Rei, Ricardo; Farajian, Amin; Klimaszewski, Mateusz; Alves, Duarte M.; Pombal, José; Boizard, Nicolas; Faysse, Manuel; Colombo, Pierre; Yvon, François; Haddow, Barry; Souza, José G. Title: EuroLLM-9B: Technical Report
Preprocessing method: deduplication, language identification, perplexity filtering, and the same set of heuristic filters that we used for the high-resource languages, using a CCNet-based preprocessing pipeline

Preprocessing method: translate all data using TOWER V2-supported languages... train a multilingual classifier on top of mDeBERTa which we use to annotate the rest of the languages.

Dataset: Parallel Data (Europarl, ParaCrawl, MultiParaCrawl, CCMatrix, CCAligned, etc.)
Preprocessing method: use Bifixer to remove duplicates and ensure translation quality by removing sentence pairs below quality thresholds for Bicleaner (threshold of 0.6 for Portuguese and of 0.5 for all the other languages) and COMETKIWI-22 (threshold of 0.7).

Title: OpenAI GPT-5 System Card
Dataset: diverse datasets, including information that is publicly available on the internet, information that we partner with third parties to access, and information that our users or human trainers and researchers provide or generate
